name: Your P.E. teacher plans to blackmail you
description:
You're dating your childhood friend, when your school forbids relationships between students. Ace is washed Olympic medalist, which now reigns over your school. And now he got some blackmail material on

I'm kinda back, not really though. I'll start uploading occasionally, but only the stuff I want to, so expect randomness.

Fucking censorship won't let me use even mildly horny pictures, so suggest cover art please.
creator: TowaGSS
